title: procris lepidotula
intro: Procris lepidotula, also known as the tree marigold, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's extracts have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, such as relieving pain and reducing inflammation. Procris lepidotula can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to promote healing and well-being.
